channel.title: ElectroMachines Lab - Interactive Electrical Engineering Simulations
channel.description: Free interactive electrical machines simulator for engineering students. Learn DC motors, AC motors, transformers, PMSM, induction machines, synchronous generators, power electronics, renewable energy systems.

item.title: DC Motor Simulator
item.description: Interactive DC motor simulator for learning shunt, series, and compound motor characteristics. Adjust voltage, current, field resistance, and see real-time speed-torque curves.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Synchronous Machine Simulator
item.description: Explore synchronous motor and generator operation with field excitation control, phasor diagrams, and power factor adjustment. Interactive 3D simulations.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Induction Machine Simulator
item.description: Deep dive into asynchronous motors and generators with slip analysis. Visualize magnetic field rotation and stator-rotor interaction.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: PMSM Simulator - Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor
item.description: Learn permanent magnet synchronous motor control techniques with vector control. Understand d-q axis transformation, torque control, and field-oriented control.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Transformer Simulator
item.description: Understand transformer operation, equivalent circuits, and applications. Interactive simulations for step-up, step-down, and isolation transformers.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Power Electronics Simulator
item.description: Learn DC-DC converters and inverters with our interactive power electronics simulator. Explore buck, boost, buck-boost topologies and PWM control.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Wind Turbine Simulator
item.description: Explore wind turbine power generation with our simulator. Understand Betz limit, blade pitch control, and power curve analysis.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Solar Panel Simulator
item.description: Learn about PV system power generation, I-V curves, MPPT algorithms, and how temperature and irradiance affect solar panel output.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: V2G Technology Simulator - Vehicle-to-Grid
item.description: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) simulator demonstrates how electric vehicles can provide grid services, frequency regulation, and bidirectional power flow.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: eVTOL Simulations - Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing
item.description: Explore electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft simulations including propulsion systems, battery management, and flight control.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: BLDC Fan Simulator
item.description: Brushless DC fan simulator for understanding electronic commutation, motor control, and cooling system design.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Circuit Breaker Simulator
item.description: Learn about circuit breaker operation, fault detection, protection coordination, and interrupting ratings.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab

item.title: Compressor Simulator
item.description: Interactive compressor simulations for understanding compression cycles, motor drives, and HVAC systems.
item.author: ElectroMachines Lab
